name: 女主反殺敵方首領
description: 平時膽小怕死的女主在關鍵時刻親手殺死叛軍首領Tyler，完成了角色弧線的最高點——從怕死到為愛赴死的蛻變。

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated as a Doomed Palace Maid...Modern Knowledge Turned Her Into the Prince’s Treasure
examples.excerpt: No one is allowed to bully him but me. He was so good to you. How dare you betray him? Just go away. ... Who said you were timid? You have enormous nerve. Killing the enemy leader. How did you dare to do that? ... Although it was risky, I wanted to try.
